rationale: Clear, vivid, and well-shaped personal nonfiction. The essay moves smoothly from routine to reflection, uses precise concrete details (the flickering light, penlight, worn bus step), and has a warm, observant voice. It loses a little on simplicity and economy because some phrasing is more lyrical than plain and a few reflections revisit the same idea, but the writing stays controlled and effective throughout.
